steps.title: Spot the transformation
steps.content: The passage shows that the carte de visite made photography “easy and enjoyable for everyday people” and that “people at the time loved exchanging these small photos” — demonstrating widespread adoption among the general population.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
“Popularize” means to make something widely accepted and beloved by ordinary people, which is precisely what the evidence shows happened to photography. The other three choices contradict the passage or fail to describe the transformation.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
